meta.title: DTS Delivery — Local commerce, deliveries & services
meta.description: List your products, receive orders, and grow your business. Join DTS Delivery as a merchant or delivery driver.

hero.title: Your business, your products, delivered
hero.subtitle: DTS Delivery connects merchants, customers, and drivers on one platform. Publish your catalog, receive real-time orders, and scale with tools built for food, retail, and home services.

howItWorks.title: How DTS works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple flow for every platform participant

steps.title: 1. Sign up
steps.description: Merchants complete a guided wizard with category templates for their vertical. Drivers register with identity verification.

steps.title: 2. Publish & configure
steps.description: Upload products with photos, category-driven variants (sizes, portions, colors), and set schedules, zones, and promotions.

steps.title: 3. Receive orders
steps.description: Customers order from the app. You manage status, inventory, and deliveries from the merchant panel or driver app.

merchants.title: Join our network and start publishing
merchants.description: Restaurants, clothing stores, bakeries, and home services: DTS gives you rich catalogs, orders, inventory, and analytics without locked-in marketplaces.
features: Registration wizard with vertical templates (food, retail, services)
Categories with inheritable parameters (sizes, colors, dough types)
Merchant panel: products, orders, promotions & inventory
Product photos, stock, and on-site service orders

drivers.title: Earn by delivering with DTS
drivers.description: Want flexible income delivering local orders? DTS connects you with merchants and customers in your area.
features: Flexible hours: you choose when to go online
Orders assigned by proximity and availability
GPS tracking and real-time delivery status
drivers.note: Driver registration will be available in the DTS Driver mobile app. Contact us for early access.

customers.title: For customers
customers.description: Discover local merchants, order food, products, or home services, and track your order to your door. The DTS customer app is coming soon to iOS and Android.

features.title: Food & beverages
features.description: Menus with variants, dynamic category fields, and appetizing product photos.

features.title: Retail & fashion
features.description: Sizes and colors inherited across parent and child categories (pants, shirts, etc.).

features.title: Home services
features.description: Cleaning, repairs, and more: estimated duration and scheduled visits.

features.title: Real-time
features.description: Order status, push notifications, and operational dashboard for merchants.

cta.title: Ready to grow with DTS?
cta.subtitle: Local customers are looking for businesses like yours. Sign up today and publish your first product in minutes.

footer.tagline: Local delivery powered by modern technology for merchants, drivers, and customers.

licenses.title: Software licenses
licenses.intro: DTS Delivery is built with open-source software. We thank the communities that make it possible.

platform.title: DTS platform
platform.content: Proprietary DTS Delivery code — including the backend API, web panels, and mobile apps — is owned by DTS and its licensors. Use is subject to merchant or driver terms of service.
